entries.rationale: Redis is optional; connection failure may fall back to deterministic in-memory cache.
entries.evidence: backend property exposes redis or memory

entries.rationale: Corrupt or unreadable prior CSV must not block fresh ingestion; output metadata records written rows and status.
Per-symbol ingestion failure is captured as an error result so batch ingestion can continue with evidence.
entries.evidence: HistoricalIngestionResult status=error message includes error class

entries.rationale: VIX candidate symbols are tried in order; provider failure on one candidate may skip to the next candidate.
entries.evidence: VixSnapshot.source_notes records selected source or unavailable state

entries.rationale: Date lookup tries multiple candidate symbols; failure on one candidate may skip to the next candidate.
entries.evidence: VixSnapshot.as_of records selected date or null unavailable state

entries.rationale: Atomic write cleanup is attempted, then the original persistence failure is propagated fail-closed.
entries.evidence: except handler unlinks temporary file and raises

entries.rationale: Symbol snapshot failures are returned as explicit symbol-scoped error strings and included in report errors.
entries.evidence: errors[] and failed_symbols[] include error class and message

entries.rationale: Client or breadth failures produce blocked/degraded regime evidence with explicit errors.
Runtime loop logs provider exceptions and raises RuntimeLoopError after configured threshold.
Outcome reads may degrade to empty only when caller supplies audit_errors and receives structured metadata.
